violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Raw chicken was observed stored above raw beef steak. Raw animal foods shall be stored in the correct order based on their final cooking temperatures. Food items were rearranged during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Establishment was observed placing fresh cut fruit (such as watermelon and pineapple) in reduced oxygen packaging without an approved HACCP plan. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Establishment is to remove vacuum packaging machine from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. equipment was inverted during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air Break was observed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
